generated_by: scheduled-task workday-t10-marketing-subject-lines — assistant fallback (marketing-skills bridge unavailable from daemon shell: no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, no plugin root on disk)

input.topic: Launch day: production URL live, Stripe in live mode, SMS on, balance invoice queued for tomorrow 9am ET.
input.scenario: Build agent has flipped status='launched' after the day-14 QA pass and the Stripe live-mode flip. Customer receives the receipt-style email.
input.voice: Operator. Receipt-style — what's on, what's tested, what's queued. 'Welcome to Day14' instead of 'congratulations'. Signed '— Jack / Day14'.

variants.subject: {{business_name}} is live
variants.rationale: Keep the current line. Three words, the only ones that matter on launch day. Customer-business-name as the subject anchor is unbeatable for opens.

variants.subject: {{business_name}} is live at {{production_url}}
variants.rationale: Puts the URL itself in the subject so the customer can copy/share without opening. Best for desktop-mail clients.

variants.subject: Day 14 — {{business_name}} shipped
variants.rationale: Closes the loop on the day-count promised in every prior CS email. Verb 'shipped' (not 'launched') keeps the operator voice consistent.
